overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character in heavy winter gear trekking through a blizzard in a mountainous snowscape. The character follows a frozen river through snow-covered valleys and pine forests before meeting a companion character walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with rock formations

events.description: character pushes through dense snow-covered bushes temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow in a mountain valley toward distant peaks

entered.detail: deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints trailing behind
large snow-covered rocky mountain formation partially obscured by fog
gentle snow-covered hillside rising in the background
partially frozen river flowing through the valley with dark water visible
sparse vegetation covered in heavy snow lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain valley with low visibility due to heavy fog. Large rock formations loom in the background while a partially frozen stream runs along the right side. The character passes through patches of snow-covered bushes as they forge a path through the deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path with snow-covered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverbank through snow-covered terrain with trees on the left

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches

segments.scene_description: The path follows closer to the frozen river as snow-covered pine trees become prominent on the left. The ground remains blanketed in deep snow. The mountain slope on the right recedes from view as the character moves into a more forested section of the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense snow-covered forest between river and cliff

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense snow-laden pine trees along the riverbank

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising beside the river

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a denser section of snow-covered forest with pine trees now surrounding the path on both sides. A steep rocky cliff becomes visible on the right beyond the river. The vegetation is thick with snow-heavy branches creating a semi-enclosed feeling.

events.description: second character becomes visible in the distance ahead on the path
ego character catches up and begins walking alongside the companion

agents.ego_description: walking toward and then alongside a companion character through the deep snow

notable_agents.action: companion character walking ahead through snow, waiting for ego to catch up

entered.detail: character dressed in winter clothing with hat and rifle slung on back

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a wider snowy slope where a second character becomes visible in the distance. As the camera approaches, the companion waits and then turns to walk alongside the ego character. The rocky cliff remains visible on the right while the pine trees fall behind, leaving an open snowy landscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded mountain valley that gradually opens into a forested slope where a companion awaits. It begins with the character forging a path through deep snow and low visibility, passing large rock formations and a partially frozen stream. As the character follows the river closer, the open valley shifts into a more secluded environment where snow-covered pine trees begin to crowd the left side of the path. The scene then tightens into a dense forest of snow-heavy branches and steep rocky cliffs before the canopy finally breaks away into a wide, open slope. The camera then approaches a second character standing in the distance, who turns to walk alongside the protagonist across the expansive snowy landscape.
